name: faf-cli
description: Persistent AI Context Standard — project DNA for AI. IANA-registered. Anthropic-approved.

scripts.build: bun build src/cli.ts --outfile dist/cli.js --target=node --minify --external faf-scoring-kernel --external open && bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target=node --minify --external faf-scoring-kernel --external open
scripts.compile:all: bun build src/cli.ts --compile --bytecode --minify --sourcemap --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile faf-darwin-arm64 && bun build src/cli.ts --compile --bytecode --minify --sourcemap --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile faf-darwin-x64 && bun build src/cli.ts --compile --bytecode --minify --sourcemap --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile faf-linux-x64 && bun build src/cli.ts --compile --bytecode --minify --sourcemap --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile faf-windows-x64.exe
scripts.check:no-hardcode: ! grep -rEln '/(Users|home/runner|private/var)/' dist/ || (echo '❌ Hardcoded build-machine path leaked into dist — see grep output above. Externalize the offending dep in the build script.'; exit 1)
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run build && bun run check:no-hardcode

author: wolfejam <wolfejam@faf.one>
